items.title: Kubernetes
items.summary: The container orchestrator at the center of the whole ecosystem.

items.title: etcd
items.summary: The strongly-consistent key-value store that holds all cluster state (via Raft).

items.title: containerd
items.summary: The industry-standard container runtime beneath Kubernetes (OCI images & runc).

items.title: CRI-O
items.summary: A lightweight container runtime built purpose-only for the Kubernetes CRI.

items.title: Helm
items.summary: The package manager for Kubernetes: charts, templates, values, releases.

items.title: Envoy
items.summary: The universal L4/L7 proxy dataplane behind most meshes and gateways.

items.title: Istio
items.summary: The feature-rich service mesh: traffic management, mTLS, telemetry on Envoy.

items.title: Linkerd
items.summary: The minimal, security-first service mesh with its own ultralight Rust proxy.

items.title: Cilium
items.summary: eBPF-powered networking, security, and observability for Kubernetes.

items.title: CoreDNS
items.summary: The pluggable DNS server that powers service discovery inside clusters.

items.title: Prometheus
items.summary: The de facto metrics & alerting system: pull scraping, labels, PromQL.

items.title: OpenTelemetry
items.summary: The vendor-neutral standard for traces, metrics, and logs (graduated 2026).

items.title: Jaeger
items.summary: Distributed tracing: follow a single request across many microservices.

items.title: Fluentd
items.summary: The unified logging layer: collect, parse, buffer, and route logs anywhere.

items.title: Argo
items.summary: GitOps CD, Kubernetes-native workflows, and progressive delivery (Argo family).

items.title: Flux
items.summary: The GitOps Toolkit: pull-based, continuous, declarative delivery from Git.

items.title: KEDA
items.summary: Event-driven autoscaling, including scale-to-zero, on top of the HPA.

items.title: Falco
items.summary: Runtime threat detection from kernel syscalls — cloud-native intrusion detection.

items.title: Open Policy Agent (OPA)
items.summary: A general-purpose policy engine (Rego) for admission control and beyond.

items.title: Kyverno
items.summary: Kubernetes-native policy as YAML: validate, mutate, and generate resources.

items.title: cert-manager
items.summary: Automated X.509 certificates in Kubernetes: Issuers, ACME, auto-renewal.

items.title: SPIFFE
items.summary: A standard for workload identity: SPIFFE IDs, trust domains, and SVIDs.

items.title: SPIRE
items.summary: The production implementation of SPIFFE: attestation and SVID issuance.

items.title: in-toto
items.summary: Cryptographic integrity for every step of the software supply chain.

items.title: The Update Framework (TUF)
items.summary: Securing software update systems against key compromise, rollback, and more.

items.title: Dapr
items.summary: A sidecar runtime with building-block APIs for distributed applications.

items.title: Knative
items.summary: Serverless on Kubernetes: scale-to-zero serving and event-driven eventing.

items.title: KubeEdge
items.summary: Extending Kubernetes orchestration out to edge nodes with offline autonomy.

items.title: CloudEvents
items.summary: A specification for describing event data in a common, portable envelope.

items.title: Crossplane
items.summary: Build control planes: manage cloud infrastructure as Kubernetes resources.

items.title: Rook
items.summary: Storage orchestration for Kubernetes — Ceph as a self-managing operator.

items.title: CubeFS
items.summary: A cloud-native distributed file and object store (metadata/data separation).

items.title: TiKV
items.summary: A distributed transactional key-value database (multi-Raft, MVCC).

items.title: Vitess
items.summary: Horizontal scaling for MySQL via sharding and query routing (VTGate).

items.title: Harbor
items.summary: An enterprise registry: RBAC, vulnerability scanning, signing, replication.

items.title: Dragonfly
items.summary: Peer-to-peer image & file distribution at scale (graduated 2026).
